sections.title: Introduction to equations
sections.description: What an equation is, deciding whether an equation is true or false, and translating worded statements into equations.

sections.title: Solving equations by inspection
sections.description: Finding the solution to a simple equation by inspection, and checking a solution by substitution.

sections.title: Equivalent equations
sections.description: Applying the same operation to both sides of an equation to produce an equivalent equation.

sections.title: Solving equations algebraically
sections.description: Solving one- and two-step equations algebraically using inverse operations, and checking solutions.

sections.title: Using formulas
sections.description: Substituting values into formulas and rearranging or solving for an unknown quantity in a formula.

sections.title: Using equations to solve problems
sections.description: Translating worded problems into equations and solving them to answer real-world questions.
